# misp_server (Resource)

A MISP sync server (peer). Represents a remote MISP instance that this instance can push to or pull from.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "misp_server" "peer" {
  name          = "MISP Peer"
  url           = "https://misp-peer.example.com"
  authkey       = var.peer_authkey
  remote_org_id = "2"

  push        = true
  pull        = true
  self_signed = false
}

# The remote MISP's API key. Never hardcode this — supply via:
#   TF_VAR_peer_authkey=...   (environment)
#   terraform apply -var "peer_authkey=..."
#   a *.tfvars file kept out of git
#   or a secrets backend (Vault / SOPS / Doppler / etc.)
variable "peer_authkey" {
  description = "API key issued by the remote MISP for this sync user."
  type        = string
  sensitive   = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `authkey` (String, Sensitive) API key used to authenticate against the remote server. Sensitive; not returned by MISP on read.
- `name` (String) Human-readable label for the remote server.
- `remote_org_id` (String) Numeric id of the organisation on *this* instance that represents the remote server's owner.
- `url` (String) Base URL of the remote MISP instance (e.g. `https://misp-peer.example.com`).

### Optional

- `caching_enabled` (Boolean) Cache data from this server for faster lookups.
- `internal` (Boolean) Mark this server as an internal link (affects distribution handling).
- `publish_without_email` (Boolean) Publish pulled events without sending notification emails.
- `pull` (Boolean) Enable pulling events from this server.
- `pull_galaxy_clusters` (Boolean) Pull galaxy clusters from this server.
- `push` (Boolean) Enable pushing events to this server.
- `push_galaxy_clusters` (Boolean) Push galaxy clusters to this server.
- `push_sightings` (Boolean) Push sightings to this server.
- `self_signed` (Boolean) Accept self-signed TLS certificates from the remote server.
- `skip_proxy` (Boolean) Bypass the configured proxy when connecting to this server.
- `unpublish_event` (Boolean) Unpublish events after pulling them from this server.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric MISP identifier.
- `organization` (String) Name of the remote organisation as learned by MISP after the first sync. Computed.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
#!/bin/sh
# Import an existing MISP sync server by its numeric id.
terraform import misp_server.peer 5
```
